paper: Analytic discrete self-similar solutions of Einstein-Klein-Gordon at large D (PRL 2026)
key_d0_reading: At black-hole threshold, GR itself produces a discrete log-scale echo lattice. D0 reads it as finite log-time recurrence of a capacity-saturating horizon readout.
no_go: D0-GRAV-DSS-NOGO-001: purely smooth monotone collapse is not the full critical gravitational readout.
book_chains_updated: trace-heat gravity → capacity growth → critical echo lattice → self-similar null horizon → terminal archive boundary → black-hole saturation
